titleStmt.title: SII 9.162: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 162. (A.R. No. 509 of 1913.) ON A SLAB IN THE GROUND OUTSIDE THE MUSEUM BUILDING, MADRAS.

summary.p: This is very much damaged and dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 18, Śrīmukha, Āshāḍha, amāvāsye, Vaḍḍavāra, Dakshiṇāyana-saṅkrānti probably corresponding to A.D. 1093 June 25 Saturday and refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva. It records that the Brāhman Vāsudēva-Ghaisāsa, son of a bhaṭṭōpādhyāya (name lost), who was the son of Vāsudēva-Kravinta, the son of Dāsiyaṇa-Kravinta, made a gift of land, free of siddhāya and bhaṭṭāya, to the Onethousand of Kukkanūr for a khaṇḍika.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
gaśiraścuṁbicandracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarārambhamūḷasta(ṁ)mbhāya śambhavē . svasti sa
bhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya
kaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipra
mācaṁdrārkkatārambaraṁ saluttamire śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 18 neya śrīmu
tsarada Āśāḍhadamāvāsya vaḍḍavāra dakṣiṇāyanasaṁkrāntiyandu sama
rāpāratīraprāptamativisēśayasaṟpatākāvabhāśitarddikcakravāḷarappa śrīma
grahāraṁ śrīkukkanūra sāsirvvaruṁ śrībrāhmaṇasāleyo bālavṛddhara ga
vāgi yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhānapārāyaṇarjja
ḷamaṇasampa(ṁ)nnarappa śrīmanu vatsagōtrardēmaruḷiya caturvvēdi
yara putrarddāśiyaṇakravintaravara putrarvvāsudēvakravintaravara putra
tyabha(ṁ)ṭṭōpādhyāyara putrarvvāsudēvaghaisāsaru śrīsāsirvvargge pāda
ṭṭu siddhāya bhattāya vasatanyāyamembuvoṁduṁ vāgadentā sarvvābādhāparihā
dada khaṁḍikakke baṭageṟeyiṁ baḍaga kuḷiyakeyalli biṭṭa mattaru nālvattu
ṁdu parmmeyoṁdu dātāra tāgidavare yupādhyāyaru . Intī dharmmavaṁ
di sāsirvvaruṁ pratipāḷisuvaru Ī dharmmamanārorvvaruṁ pratipālisidavargge
gurukṣētradoḷu sahasrabrāhmaṇargge sahasrakavileyaṁ dānaṁgoṭṭa phala Idanā
ḷidamā vāraṇāsiya kurukṣētradoḷu sahasra brāhmaṇarumaṁ sahasrakavile
svahastadiṁ koṁda mahāpātakanakku . madvaṁśajāḥ paramahīpativaṁśajā vā pāpāda
nasō bhuvi bhūmipālāḥ . yē pālayaṁti mama dharmmamimaṁ samastaṁ tēbhyō
viracitōṁjalirēśa mūrddhni . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē
yō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētānbhāginaḥ pārtthivēndrānbhūyō nbhūyō yācatērā
. svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrā
yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.162 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
